def positive_pandas_iterrows_in_loop():
    rule_id = "pandas_iterrows_in_loop"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "iterrows() is used on DataFrames instead of vectorized operations or itertuples()."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
